topics.title: Colman Domingo Slams Elon Musk's AI 'Odyssey' Plan: 'Whiter Than Christmas'
topics.primaryKeyword: colman domingo elon musk ai odyssey
topics.angle: Colman Domingo voices strong opposition to Elon Musk's AI-generated 'The Odyssey' film, criticizing its potential for historical inaccuracy and lack of diversity.

sources.headline: Colman Domingo Rips Elon Musk s Plan for AI The Odyssey Movie: It ll Be ‘Whiter Than Christmas at Cracker Barrel’
sources.summary: Colman Domingo slammed Elon Musk s plan for an AI-generated version of The Odyssey. “By historically accurate, he means whiter than Christmas at Cracker Barrel,” Domingo joked during his stint as guest host on Jimmy Kimmel Live! on Wednesday night. Of course, this is all because Elon and his Musketeers are upset over the diversity casting [ ]

sources.headline: Colman Domingo Says Elon Musk s AI Version of The Odyssey Will Be Whiter Than Christmas at Cracker Barrel
sources.summary: "You can't make a 'historically accurate' version of something that is totally made the f—k up," the "Jimmy Kimmel Live!" guest host adds The post Colman Domingo Says Elon Musk s AI Version of The Odyssey Will Be Whiter Than Christmas at Cracker Barrel appeared first on TheWrap .

topics.title: Destin Daniel Cretton Believes Secrecy Around Sadie Sink’s Role Makes ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ a Better Movie
topics.angle: Director discusses the strategic secrecy around Sadie Sink's role in the upcoming Spider-Man film.

sources.headline: Destin Daniel Cretton Believes Secrecy Around Sadie Sink’s Role Makes ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ a Better Movie
sources.summary: Five few years ago, Tobey Maguire and Andrew Garfield were kept out of the marketing for 'No Way Home.' Marvel and Sony are somewhat repeating that playbook for the 'Stranger Things' star's mystery part.

topics.title: BMF Star Da Vinchi Joins Chicago Fire For Season 15
topics.angle: BMF actor Da Vinchi joins the cast of NBC's Chicago Fire as a series regular.

sources.headline: BMF Star Da Vinchi Joins Chicago Fire For Season 15
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: After playing one of the real-life crime duo, the Flenory Brothers, on Starz s BMF, Da Vinchi has joined the series regular cast of NBC s Chicago Fire. Da Vinchi joins the Chicago Fire cast: Taylor Kinney, David Eigenberg, Miranda Rae Mayo, Christian Stolte, Joe Miñoso, Jocelyn Hudon and Brandon Larracuente. The new season premieres on Wednesday, Oct. 7 at 9 p.m. [ ]

sources.summary: Netflix has added ten new cast members to its Myron Bolitar series. Ra Mya Latiah Aikens ( Romeo and Juliet (Shakespeare in the Park)) has joined the show in a series regular role. topics.title: Artists Equity, Hidden Content, Ultraboom Media And Icki Eneo Arlo Partner On Doc 'Shot in the Dark,' Following First U.S. Paralympic Blind Soccer Team
topics.angle: Robert Pattinson's company Artists Equity is partnering on a new documentary about the first U.S. Paralympic blind soccer team.

sources.headline: Artists Equity, Hidden Content, Ultraboom Media And Icki Eneo Arlo Partner On Doc Shot in the Dark , Following First U.S. Paralympic Blind Soccer Team
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Artists Equity has partnered with Hidden Content, UltraBoom Media and Robert Pattinson’s Icki Eneo Arlo to produce the documentary Shot in the Dark. The feature follows the first U.S. Paralympic Blind Soccer team from their historic roots in 2022 to their attempt to shock the world and win gold at the 2028 Paralympic Games. [ ]

topics.title: Mike Flanagan's 'Carrie' and 'Crystal Lake' to Premiere at TIFF Primetime

sources.headline: Toronto: Mike Flanagan s Carrie, Shawn Ryan’s American Hostage Join Primetime 2026 Program
sources.summary: The episodic TV sidebar also has premieres for the latest season of ‘Slow Horses' and ‘Crystal Lake,’ the 'Friday the 13th' prequel.

sources.headline: TIFF Primetime Lineup Touts TV Horror with Mike Flanagan s Carrie, A24 s Crystal Lake
sources.summary: The episodic section launches with "Below," starring Josh Hartnett and Mackenzie Davis, with additional premieres of Shawn Ryan's "American Hostage" and the new season of "Slow Horses."

topics.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds Takes a New Tact to Combat an Old Prequel Problem
topics.primaryKeyword: star trek strange new worlds season 4
topics.angle: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds is employing a new narrative approach to overcome challenges inherent in its prequel status.

sources.headline: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds Takes a New Tact to Combat an Old Prequel Problem
sources.summary: As a prequel series approaching its predetermined endpoint, Season 4 faces familiar struggles. But as a return to the franchise's fun, curious, episodic storytelling, it's also making the most of the time it has left.

topics.title: Atari Makes Universal Movie Deal For 10 Iconic Game Properties; First Up Is Original Script By Matt Reilly Carl Hampe, With Entertainment 360 Producing
topics.angle: Atari inks a major movie deal with Universal Pictures for 10 iconic game properties.

sources.headline: Atari Makes Universal Movie Deal For 10 Iconic Game Properties; First Up Is Original Script By Matt Reilly Carl Hampe, With Entertainment 360 Producing
sources.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Partnering with Entertainment 360, Atari has signed a deal with Universal Pictures giving the studio the right to develop 10 classic Atari video game properties for the big screen. Universal has bought the first project from the new partnership, a feature film based on Atari IP which will be produced by Entertainment 360’s Guymon [ ]

sources.summary: A record-setting plunge got her on ‘You Bet Your Life’ with Groucho Marx, followed by work in ‘Boy on a Dolphin,’ ‘Underwater Warrior’ and ‘Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea.’
